testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
16:45:29.532 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.insi.javaspring.JavaSpringApplicationTests]: JavaSpringApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:45:29.703 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.insi.javaspring.JavaSpringApplication for test class org.insi.javaspring.JavaSpringApplicationTests

:: Spring Boot :: (v4.0.3)

undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-03-31T16:45:35.807+03:00 INFO 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 2026-03-31T16:45:35.832+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists demande_cin cascade 2026-03-31T16:45:35.833+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists password_reset_otp cascade 2026-03-31T16:45:35.833+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists users cascade 2026-03-31T16:45:35.840+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table citoyen (date_naissance date not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, adresse varchar(255) not null, cin varchar(255) not null, lieu_naissance varchar(255) not null, nom varchar(255) not null, photo varchar(255) not null, prenom varchar(255) not null, profession varchar(255) not null, sexe enum ('FEMME','HOMME') not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-31T16:45:35.857+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table demande_cin (date_depot date not null, citoyen_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, agent_responsable varchar(255) not null, numero_dossier varchar(255) not null unique, demande enum ('DUPLICATA','NOUVELLE_CIN','RENOUVELLEMENT') not null, status enum ('EN_ATTENTE','EN_COURS','IMPRIMEE','REJETEE','VALIDEE') not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-31T16:45:35.862+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table password_reset_otp (expires_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null, otp varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-31T16:45:35.864+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users (enabled boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, first_name varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','AGENT_ENREGISTREMENT','SUPERVISEUR') not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-31T16:45:35.867+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists demande_cin add constraint FKtqkxivi9njh6emjs3wrllfunn foreign key (citoyen_id) references citoyen 2026-03-31T16:45:35.887+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists demande_cin add constraint FKbbyc9f5futqucws622jb2m5jv foreign key (user_id) references users Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-03-31T16:45:36.894+03:00 INFO 80959 --- [ main] eAuthenticationProviderManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with AuthenticationProvider bean with name authProvider 2026-03-31T16:45:36.895+03:00 WARN 80959 --- [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. UserDetailsService beans will not be used by Spring Security for automatically configuring username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider. If the current configuration is intentional, to turn off this warning, increase the logging level of 'org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.InitializeUserDetailsBeanManagerConfigurer' to ERROR 2026-03-31T16:45:37.232+03:00 INFO 80959 --- [ main] o.s.b.w.a.WelcomePageHandlerMapping : Adding welcome page template: index 2026-03-31T16:45:37.380+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : 36 mappings in 'requestMappingHandlerMapping' 2026-03-31T16:45:37.441+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] o.s.w.s.handler.SimpleUrlHandlerMapping : Patterns [/webjars/**, /**] in 'resourceHandlerMapping' 2026-03-31T16:45:37.486+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerAdapter : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ModelAttribute, 0 @InitBinder, 2 RequestBodyAdvice, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-03-31T16:45:37.637+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ExceptionHandler, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-03-31T16:45:37.944+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] .s.b.a.l.ConditionEvaluationReportLogger :

2026-03-31T16:45:37.953+03:00 INFO 80959 --- [ main] o.i.j.JavaSpringApplicationTests : Started JavaSpringApplicationTests in 7.986 seconds (process running for 10.33) 2026-03-31T16:45:37.954+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state LivenessState changed to CORRECT 2026-03-31T16:45:38.584+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.role=? fetch first ? rows only 2026-03-31T16:45:38.806+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : insert into users (created_at,email,enabled,first_name,last_name,password,role,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) ====================================== ADMIN PAR DEFAUT CREE Email: admin@cin.local Password: admin123 ====================================== 2026-03-31T16:45:38.835+03:00 DEBUG 80959 --- [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state ReadinessState changed to ACCEPTING_TRAFFIC
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/fitiavana/Documents/L2ordi/L2/JAVA/examjava/project-CIN (6)/project-CIN/.mvn/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
